mapper.select:
select distinct c.codetext, c.codeid from synlte.fieldcode c where c.codeid in (select distinct c.codeid from synlte.fieldcode c where deleted = 0 or deleted is null)
and c.codetext like '%${codeText}%'

select distinct c.codetext from synlte.fieldcode c
(deleted = 0 or deleted is null)
and c.codetext like '%${codeText}%'

select c.codeid codeId, c.codename codeName, c.codetext codeText, c.memo memo, c.parcodeid parcodeId from synlte.fieldcode c
where c.codeid = #{codeId}

select v.codevalid, v.codeid, v.valtext, v.valvalue, v.memo, v.valtexttitle from synlte.fieldcodeval v where v.codeid = #{codeId}
and v.valtext like '%${valText}%'

select distinct v.valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval v where v.codeid = #{codeId}
and v.valtext like '%${valText}%'
